prompt: Create a high-quality 3D square product visual based on the full-body character in the reference image. Reconstruct the person into a luxury 4D art figure for adults, keeping the facial features and silhouette. The model should have a 24-year-old adult physique (6.5-7 head proportions) with an elegant, mysterious expression. Hair should follow the flow of the reference image with black with pink highlights. The hair and outfit should convey depth and movement. Material should look like matte resin, semi-gloss soft vinyl, or ceramic. Replace original clothing with a luxury crimson to wine red high-fashion dress featuring sculptural drapes and asymmetrical silhouettes. Place the figure inside a vertical rectangular acrylic capsule case with thick edges and champagne gold framing. Background is a luxury museum with high ceilings and marble walls. Use spotlighting to create beautiful reflections on the red dress and transparent case.
